features: SOOTHING & RELAXING: Escenti Cool Feet Softening Foot Lotion, enriched with menthol, peppermint and tea tree. Treat, refresh and soften feet quickly and easily at the end of every day
ESSENTIAL WELLBEING FRAGRANCE: Enriched with peppermint, menthol and tea tree, your feet will feel cool, refreshed and hydrated after every use. Suitable for daily use

FOOT CARE ESSENTIAL: Tired, aching feet after a long day? Escenti Cool Feet Super Softening Lotion moisturisers to help soften dry, hard skin, this cream will leave your feet feeling smooth, soft and supple. Search Amazon.co.uk for the Escenti Foot Care range

USE A LITTLE, CARE A LOT: Escenti Cool Feet Softening Foot Lotion is formualated for daily use, use a little at the end of each day to care a lot for often neglected feet, improve skin texture and comfort quickly and easily
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: READY TO USE, RE-SEALABLE 150ml TUBE
description: Product Description ESCENTI COOL FEET SUPER SOFTENING FOOT LOTION, FRAGRANCE ENRICHED Safety Warning For external use only; patch test before use; discontinue if irritation occurs; keep out of reach of children; avoid ingestion; store in a cool, dry place; do not use on broken skin; use within expiry date; avoid sharing; flammable if applicable.
